entities.name: secondsRemaining
entities.description: Function that computes remaining lock time in seconds.

entities.name: between
entities.description: Duration.between call used to compute time difference.

entities.name: max
entities.description: Math.max call used to enforce a minimum value.

entities.name: toSeconds
entities.description: Method that converts a duration to seconds.

relations.description: secondsRemaining calls between to compute the duration.
secondsRemaining calls max to enforce a minimum of 1 second.
secondsRemaining calls toSeconds on the computed duration.
